name: PTESTR #5,(A0),#7 via SRP (SRE=1, WP marks SRP path)
LIVE remap store: va $8010 -> pa $9010 (M-bit in LEVC[8])
LIVE remap load: va $8020 reads pa $9020 (U-bit, M clear)
LIVE ATC stale: edit LEVC[8] without PFLUSH, store again
LIVE ATC flush: edit LEVC[8] + PFLUSHA, store goes to new pa
FAULT store to invalid page (berr, frame on stack)
FAULT PMOVE TC enable with bad geometry (MMU config exc)
